title: Peaceful Hunger | UPDATED
description: Allows you to starve in Peaceful!
body:
*This mod has recently been updated to an internal version of 2.2.2!*

![a banner displaying the text Peaceful Hunger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebc2a687cfa705b40524b92d4ba6a908cfdfda26.png)
![a banner displaying the text Summary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a077f88e3ee8f2f2ee31182c1a84a3badc9bf3.png)
Peaceful Hunger is a simple mod that allows your hunger and saturation levels to deplete normally while playing on Peaceful difficulty. This mod was inspired by a user on reddit; "I just want to play in peaceful mode but still get hungry. I play farming mods a lot and there's no point to farming/cooking if you can't eat it. But I hate hostile mobs,personally."

<!-- This mod was inspired by a user on reddit; u/Hollyetravels commented, "I just want to play in peaceful mode but still get hungry. I play farming mods a lot and there's no point to farming/cooking if you can't eat it. But I hate hostile mobs,personally." -->

![a banner displaying the text FAQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fad4cd60ff220fa0a97abeb313b97cb9e4258f17.png)
This mod uses Redirects from SpongePowered Mixin to change the relevant difficulty for health regeneration and hunger effects, specifically on the tick method of FoodData.class, and the aiStep method of Player.class

[![a banner displaying the text Use Code Lupin for 25% off Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e4976e41fe589adc8517322bf609d6122548693.png)
](https://bisecthosting.com/Lupin)
